title: The US Approves the Launch of a Mirror Satellite That Can Reflect Sunlight and Illuminate the Earth at Night - WIRED
summary_full: The US Approves the Launch of a Mirror Satellite That Can Reflect Sunlight and Illuminate the Earth at Night  WIREDF.C.C. Approves Test of Space Mirror to Light Night Sky Despite Outcry  The New York TimesSouthern California company wants to bring daylight to dark parts of Earth  KTLAFCC approves first Reflect Orbital satellite  SpaceNewsThe FCC just gave Reflect Orbital permission to launch its 1st space mirror to orbit. Tens of thousands more could follow  Space
